mapper.select: SELECT id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, version, created_at, updated_at FROM work_item ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, version, created_at, updated_at FROM work_item WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, version, created_at, updated_at FROM work_item WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_item (id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{type}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{projectId}, #{spaceId}, #{iterationId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{assigneeUserId}, #{currentWorkflowInstanceId}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
